title: Senior Associate (Processing Loan - Syndicated Loan/ Corporate Bank)
description:
Communication Section

  • Maintain proper record on the correspondence receipt and dissemination process

  • Maintain a log of communication system activity and changes

  • Prepare request from other sections on message transmission[including funds movement] through the communication systems maintained by Communication Section

  • Follow-up of any delayed or undelivered messages

  • Monitor messages detected by TSS and process detection (including review)

  • Update and maintain the Branch Anti-Terrorist Consolidated List and Japan Authorities List and undertake the task of scanning list against NOVAS database regularly

  • Perform all administrative duties relating to the maintenance of the communication systems

  • Keep all files and filing relating to communication operations up-to-date

  • Perform monthly report and checklists (daily and monthly) for communication operations

  • Process RMA (Relationship Management Application)

  • Process GPI (Payment tracking platform) monitoring

  • Support section in monthly check list

  • Perform monthly check on contracts and documents stored in vault room

  • Support the section in its daily operations

  • Perform any other duties that the Management may assign from time to time

Loan Administration

  • Provide administrative support to Credit Investment Department

  • Initiate funding request and raise Operation Sheets for assigned loans portfolio

  • Maintain up-to-date Drawdown Ringi, records and files for assigned loans portfolio

  • Monitor loans drawdowns and terms and conditions of facilities against Credit Application

  • Contact external parties on interest rate fixing and other relevant administrative matters

  • Monitor receipt of Withholding Tax Receipts and prepare report to Head Office

  • Support the section in its daily operations

  • Perform any other duties that the Management may assign from time to time

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, kindly send your resume in MS WORD format or please click on “Apply Now”.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

EA Personnel: Lee Jun Siong (Johnson)

EA Personnel Reg No: R24120242

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
